ui.window_help: The app monitors the Path of Exile window every second. Alter and item points are relative to that window origin.
ui.clipboard_help: Hover the item, send Ctrl+C, and match the copied text against the target list.
ui.hotkey_help: F2 stops globally, F3 starts globally; click jitter affects clicks only, not hover checks.
ui.item_points_help: New item points are stored relative to the Path of Exile window origin.

runtime_map.目前沒有可用的前景視窗。: No usable foreground window is available.
runtime_map.剪貼簿測試未命中目標文字。: Clipboard test did not match any target text.
runtime_map.未監視到目標視窗，無法開始。: Target window is not detected, cannot start.
runtime_map.F2 可全域立即停止，F3 可全域開始。: F2 stops globally, F3 starts globally.
runtime_map.已啟用人性化延遲：每次等待會額外隨機增加 0.01~0.05 秒。: Humanized delay enabled: each wait adds an extra random 0.01~0.05 seconds.
runtime_map.已啟用模擬真人模式：會加入短移動時間、假性停頓與更自然的重試節奏。: Human-like mode enabled: adds short movement times, fake pauses, and more natural retry pacing.
runtime_map.未設定右鍵點，將只做 hover + 判斷。: No alter position set. Only hover + detection will run.
runtime_map.整段 Shift 模式已啟用：首次取用後，循環期間會持續按住 Shift。: Shift loop mode enabled: after the first pickup, Shift stays held during the loop.
runtime_map.所有物品點都已完成，流程已停止。: All item points are complete. Automation stopped.
runtime_map.滑鼠移到左上角觸發 PyAutoGUI failsafe，流程已停止。: Moved mouse to the top-left corner and triggered PyAutoGUI failsafe. Automation stopped.
runtime_map.註冊全域快捷鍵 F2 失敗，請改用停止按鈕。: Failed to register global hotkey F2. Use the Stop button instead.
runtime_map.註冊全域快捷鍵 F3 失敗，請改用開始按鈕。: Failed to register global hotkey F3. Use the Start button instead.
